; --- globals ---
@.fmt.concat.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [7 x i8] c"%s %s\0A\00", align 1
@.fmt.concat.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [10 x i8] c"%s %s %s\0A\00", align 1
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"hello\00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c" \00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 42
  %t1 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t2 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t3 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t4 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.concat.0, ptr %t3, ptr %t4)
  %t6 = add i32 0, 1
  %t7 = add i32 0, 2
  %t8 = add i32 0, 3
  %t9 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t10 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t11 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t12 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t13 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t14 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  %t15 = inttoptr i64 0 to ptr
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.concat.1, ptr %t13, ptr %t14, ptr %t15)
  ret i32 0
}
